achievers.name: Ravi Raj
achievers.achievement: AIR 20 in UPSC CSE 2025. His mother became his 'eyes,' reading textbooks to him daily.

achievers.name: Athira Sugathan
achievers.achievement: Rank 483 in UPSC CSE 2025 after a 2016 accident left her wheelchair-bound.

achievers.name: Manvendra Singh
achievers.achievement: AIR 112 in UPSC Engineering Services Examination (ESE), IIT Patna graduate.

achievers.name: Rahul Bajaj
achievers.achievement: India's first visually impaired Rhodes Scholar, now at Oxford.

achievers.name: Deepthi Jeevanji
achievers.achievement: Arjuna Awardee, BBC Indian Sportswoman of the Year 2025 nominee, Paralympic hopeful.

achievers.name: Saurav Kumar
achievers.achievement: IIT Roorkee graduate, national para swimming star with 2 silver medals in 3 months.

achievers.name: Arvind Rao
achievers.achievement: Delhi High Court advocate, Supreme Court victory on student rights.

achievers.name: Hunny Bhagchandani
achievers.achievement: Forbes Asia 30 Under 30 (2025), founder of TorchIt (3 lakh+ users across 40+ countries).

achievers.name: Anandita Kumar
achievers.achievement: Music therapist at the special school that once supported her.

achievers.name: Ekjot Singh
achievers.achievement: Gold medal in powerlifting at Special Olympics Bharat.

achievers.name: Preeti Pal
achievers.achievement: Second gold at World Para Athletics Grand Prix 2026.

achievers.name: Sumit Antil
achievers.achievement: Gold in Men's Javelin at World Para Athletics Grand Prix 2026 (69.25m throw).

achievers.name: A Abdullah Afridh
achievers.achievement: AIR 942 in UPSC CSE 2025 on first attempt.

achievers.name: Maya Bhammar
achievers.achievement: Silver at 23rd Senior National Para Powerlifting Championship 2025–26.

achievers.name: Ruchita Sahukari
achievers.achievement: Now studying journalism at IIMC after being denied schooling until 18.

legends.name: Ira Singhal
legends.achievement: AIR 1 in UPSC CSE 2014, first woman with disability to top the exam.

legends.name: Arunima Sinha
legends.achievement: First Indian female amputee to climb Mount Everest.

legends.name: Srikanth Bolla
legends.achievement: Founder & CEO of Bollant Industries (₹50+ Crore), MIT graduate.

legends.name: Dr. Suresh Advani
legends.achievement: Padma Bhushan awardee, pioneered Bone Marrow Transplants in India.

legends.name: Sai Prasad Vishwanathan
legends.achievement: First Indian with disability to earn a skydiving license, Google Engineer.

legends.name: Pranjal Patil
legends.achievement: India's first blind woman IAS officer.

featured_scholarships.name: Top Class Education for PwD
featured_scholarships.eligibility: Students with 40%+ disability at premier institutions

featured_scholarships.name: Microsoft Disability Scholarship
featured_scholarships.eligibility: High school seniors planning tech careers

platforms.name: SwarajAbility
platforms.details: AI-Powered livelihood platform for PwDs. World's first AI-driven job hunt assistant for inclusion.

platforms.name: Sugamya Bharat
platforms.details: AI-Optimized accessibility tracker & job portal for government inclusion.

platforms.name: NCS Portal
platforms.details: Unified Government Career Service with mandatory PwD job quotas.

skill_pathways.details: Screen reader compatible, sign language videos. Gov recognized.
Financial aid available. Screen reader support university certificates.

motivational_insights.text: Your disability is an opportunity to find your own unique strengths.
motivational_insights.author: Ravi Raj (AIR 20, UPSC 2025)

motivational_insights.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivational_insights.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivational_insights.text: Inclusion is not a matter of political correctness. It is the key to growth.
motivational_insights.author: OneBridge AI

motivational_insights.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
motivational_insights.author: Winston Churchill

motivational_insights.text: I don't have a disability, I have a different ability.
motivational_insights.author: Robert M. Hensel
